Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Apr-29-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The Law Offices of Martin M. Eisenberg's Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel for the PETITIONER KRUEGER BROS. BUILDERS, INC.'S is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Denise Doucette, CSR No. 5963; Dept. 302.
